data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of confirming each checklist item with a timestamp. However, while the linked use case mentions that a timestamp is recorded when a patient checks off a task, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates this functionality across all checklist items. The evidence only confirms a single instance of a timestamp being recorded, which does not fulfill the requirement for comprehensive confirmation of each item with a timestamp.
gaps: No evidence confirming timestamps for each checklist item.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for timestamp confirmation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that each checklist item has a corresponding timestamp recorded upon completion.
